name: heading
label: Heading
default: Delivery shaped by the standards we uphold

name: subtitle
label: Subtitle
default: End-to-end capability across AWS cloud, data, AI, and applications

name: content_style
label: Layout
help_text: Capabilities: accordion with title, brief (collapsed), description (expanded), and sub-cards. Points: same pattern using Title = Section title, Brief (collapsed row), Description (expanded); bullet matrix instead of sub-cards. Existing pages keep heading/intro keys in JSON when resaved.

children.name: brief
children.label: Brief (collapsed description)
children.default: Mapping every AWS decision to C-suite metrics, delivering up to 25–35% cost reduction with embedded FinOps discipline

children.name: description
children.label: Description (expanded)
children.default: Before a single resource is provisioned, we map every AWS decision to C-suite metrics, delivering up to 25–35% cost reduction via landing zones with embedded FinOps discipline.

default.title: Cloud Strategy & Infrastructure
default.brief: Mapping every AWS decision to C-suite metrics, delivering up to 25–35% cost reduction with embedded FinOps discipline
default.description: Before a single resource is provisioned, we map every AWS decision to C-suite metrics, delivering up to 25–35% cost reduction via landing zones with embedded FinOps discipline.

cards.title: AWS CAF Assessments
cards.description: Readiness mapped to business goals before investment is committed. No surprises, no rework once you start building.

cards.title: Landing Zone Design & Build
cards.description: Secure, multi-account foundations that eliminate compliance rework from day one, embedded with guardrails, logging, and IAM.

cards.title: Well-Architected Reviews
cards.description: Structural risk identified and remediated before it becomes an incident. Every phase gate cleared with zero compliance findings.

cards.title: FinOps & Cost Optimization
cards.description: Average 30% cloud spend reduction built into architecture and continuously governed. Designed out before go-live.

default.title: Migration & Modernization
default.brief: Modernize without disruption. Using AI-assisted tools and EVOQ pattern libraries, we cut migration timelines up to 60% across every architectural layer
default.description: Modernize without disruption. Using AI-assisted tools and EVOQ pattern libraries, we cut migration timelines up to 60% across every architectural layer.

cards.title: Migration Portfolio Discovery
cards.description: Full-estate assessment, wave planning, and dependency mapping so migrations proceed without surprises. AI-assisted tooling cuts scoping effort by up to 60%.

cards.title: Server, Database & Mainframe Migration
cards.description: Risk-managed, wave-based migrations that keep business-critical systems live throughout. Zero unplanned downtime across every engagement to date.

cards.title: VMware & Large-Scale Estate Migration
cards.description: Exit legacy infrastructure at scale without disrupting what runs the business. Proven patterns for petabyte-scale data and multi-thousand VM estates.

cards.title: Legacy Modernization via AWS Transform
cards.description: Technical debt converted to delivery velocity. Agentic AI-powered code conversion for COBOL, .NET, and Java: modernized applications, not just lifted ones.

default.title: Cloud-Native Engineering & DevSecOps
default.brief: Cloud-native applications built to AWS standards: microservices, serverless, event-driven, API-first.
default.description: Cloud-native applications built to AWS standards: microservices, serverless, event-driven, API-first. DevSecOps gates embedded from first commit so security and compliance never become a release blocker.

cards.title: Containers & Kubernetes Platforms
cards.description: Workloads that scale reliably, deploy consistently, and cost less to operate. EKS, ECS, and Fargate managed as a product, not a project.

cards.title: Serverless & Event-Driven Architectures
cards.description: Applications that scale to zero and to millions without operational overhead. Event-driven design that decouples services and eliminates brittle integrations.

cards.title: DevSecOps & CI/CD Pipelines
cards.description: Security and quality gates embedded in every deployment pipeline. Faster releases with fewer incidents, not a trade-off between speed and control.

cards.title: API Design, Management & Front-End
cards.description: APIs that expose your platform's value without creating fragility. Governed, versioned, and secured from the first endpoint.

default.title: Data & Analytics
default.brief: Governed, AI-ready data platforms built for scale and purpose — lakes, lakehouses, real-time streaming, and mesh architectures.
default.description: Governed, AI-ready data platforms built for scale and purpose: lakes, lakehouses, real-time streaming, and mesh architectures designed to feed the AI models and analytics workloads your business depends on.

cards.title: Data Lake, Lakehouse & Mesh Architecture
cards.description: Data foundations built for AI-readiness, not just reporting. Governed, domain-oriented, and structured so every downstream model has what it needs.

cards.title: Real-Time Analytics & Streaming
cards.description: Business decisions made on what is happening now. Sub-second event processing at any volume, with the governance your compliance team requires.

cards.title: Operational & NoSQL Databases
cards.description: The right database for each workload, not one size forced to fit all. Consistent performance at scale, with cost and resilience engineered in from the start.

cards.title: Data Governance, Quality & Clean Rooms
cards.description: Data your teams can trust and your regulators can audit. Lineage, quality controls, and privacy-preserving collaboration built into the platform.

default.title: Agentic & Generative AI
default.brief: Production-grade, governed AI that automates underwriting, claims triage, and supply-chain decisioning
default.description: Deploy production-grade, governed AI that automates underwriting, claims triage, and supply-chain decisioning — engineered for real business outcomes from day one.

cards.title: Enterprise Generative AI
cards.description: Production-grade GenAI for real business outcomes. Governed document intelligence, AI-powered customer engagement, and automated knowledge work built to run in regulated environments from day one.

cards.title: Autonomous Agentic Workflows
cards.description: Multi-agent systems that execute complex, multi-step business processes end to end. Memory, guardrails, audit trails, and human-in-the-loop escalation built in from the start.

cards.title: AI-Augmented Development
cards.description: Developer productivity and operational intelligence amplified by AI. Faster delivery cycles, smarter code review, and self-healing infrastructure via EVOQ and Amazon Q.

cards.title: ML Platforms & AI-Ready Data
cards.description: End-to-end ML engineering: training, deployment, monitoring, and automated retraining on the vector data substrate that keeps retrieval and reasoning sharp at scale.

default.title: Security, Compliance & Governance
default.brief: Zero-Trust architecture, continuous compliance automation mapped to SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI DSS.
default.description: Zero-Trust architecture with automated compliance mapped to SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI DSS, and audit-ready evidence, ensuring CISO sign-off at every phase without slowing delivery.

cards.title: Zero-Trust Architecture & Identity
cards.description: Least-privilege access, service control policies, and network segmentation in every landing zone. No implicit trust, no open blast radius.

cards.title: Threat Detection & Response
cards.description: Continuous threat monitoring with automated response playbooks. Incidents detected and contained before they become breaches or headlines.

cards.title: Compliance Automation & Audit Readiness
cards.description: SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI DSS mapped and evidenced continuously. Audits become reviews, not fire drills. CRO and CISO sign-off at every phase gate.

cards.title: Policy-as-Code Governance
cards.description: Guardrails enforced automatically in every deployment pipeline. Governance that accelerates delivery rather than blocking it.

default.title: Managed Cloud Operations & SRE
default.brief: Embedded SRE, full-stack observability, and continuous FinOps discipline keep your estate healthy, cost-efficient, and self-improving.
default.description: Embedded SRE, full-stack observability, and continuous FinOps discipline keep your estate healthy, cost-efficient, and self-improving. EVOQ agentic operations detect, diagnose, and remediate autonomously — reducing MTTR and eliminating operational drift.

cards.title: AWS Managed Operations
cards.description: Your cloud estate managed as a product, not a cost center. Proactive operations that maintain reliability and keep your teams focused on building, not firefighting.

cards.title: Full-Stack Observability & AIOps
cards.description: Complete visibility across infrastructure, applications, and cost. AI-powered anomaly detection that finds problems before your customers do.

cards.title: FinOps Continuous Optimization
cards.description: Cloud spend continuously right-sized against actual usage. Waste eliminated at the source, not recovered quarterly in a spreadsheet.

cards.title: Resilience Engineering & Disaster Recovery
cards.description: Recovery objectives met and tested, not just documented. Chaos engineering and game-day exercises that prove resilience before you need it.

children.name: brief
children.label: Brief (collapsed row)
children.default: Optimizing human-AI workflows through high-adoption, error-reducing end-to-end design

children.name: intro
children.label: Description (expanded)
children.default: We design end-to-end platforms and products that cut task completion time, reduce error rates and drive measurable adoption. Built for human users and AI agents operating within the same environment.

default.heading: Product & Platform Design
default.brief: Optimizing human-AI workflows through high-adoption, error-reducing end-to-end design
default.intro: We design end-to-end platforms and products that cut task completion time, reduce error rates and drive measurable adoption. Built for human users and AI agents operating within the same environment.
